```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <stdexcept>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Step 1: Create a buffer_adaptor from the input span (with const_cast)
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(const_cast<std::span<uint8_t>>(buffer));

    // Step 2: Use the buffer_adaptor's read_ptr() to get the current read pointer.
    auto ptr = adaptor.read_ptr();

    // Step 3: Check if there's enough data for the header.
    if (adaptor.size() < sizeof(PacketHeader)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small");
    }

    // Step 4: Use binary_stream's span() method to get a view of the header data.
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    auto header_span = stream.span<PacketHeader>(1);

    // Step 5: Copy the header fields from the span view to the PacketHeader struct.
    PacketHeader header = header_span[0];

    return header;
}
```
